{{Quote|Tartan Cruiser reporting.|Unnamed Tartan Cruiser commander|<ref name="EAW" />}}
The '''''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser''', also known as the '''''Tartan''-class corvette''' or simply '''''Tartan'' patrol cruiser''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] ship developed by [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]] towards the start of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==Characteristics==
Armed with twenty [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], the ''Tartan''-class cruisers were designed for use against [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]], and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] vessels. Most notably, powerful [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] and computer systems enabled their guns to engage rapidly with swarms of small, swift targets, although these systems came at a hefty price.<ref name="EAW" />

In addition, powerful engines gave these ships the speed and maneuverability to engage directly with starfighters, and the systems that channeled power from the generators to systems throughout the hull were also versatile and sophisticated, being able to redirect energy from the deflector [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] to give more firepower to the weapons systems. However, they were more or less useless against larger capital ships, such as [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruisers]], [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], or [[Keldabe-class cruiser|''Keldabe''-class battleships]], unless in large numbers.<ref name="EAW" />

==History==
[[File:TartFORALL.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Tartan''-class side-view.]]
During the unstable times following the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Damorian Manufacturing Corporation was tasked to develop a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] capable of engaging with small, fast-moving targets as a response to increased piracy. The end result was the ''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser, which was equipped with an advanced tracking system.<ref name="Tartan patrol cruiser in the databank" />

The ''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser were similar to the later and somewhat better-known [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|KDY]] [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]], which had an almost identical armament and a similar mission profile, and also with the [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]], a larger patrol vessel with a very similar armament.

Whereas the ''Lancer''-class ships were basically defensive platforms designed to do no more than keep pace with larger [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], and while the bulk cruiser was a cheap design known for its slow speeds, the ''Tartan''-class was fast and agile, able to skirmish directly with enemy starfighters—displaying the same pace and agility as the same manufacturer's earlier [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]]. This agility often led to it being used as reinforcement for the defense of [[Cardan-class space station|''Cardan''-class space stations]].<ref name="EAW" /><ref name="MTS2">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Mesop2|text=Message to Spacers 2}}</ref>

Known ships used by the Empire were the ''[[Diadem]]'' and the ''[[Battler]]''.<ref name="Tartan patrol cruiser in the databank" /><ref name="EAW" /> A few of the ships also fell into the hands of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] through bribery of their crews, though the Consortium also acquired the actual ships to be manned by its own soldiers through pirating them.<ref name="FOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Tartan''-class design was created for the game ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', where it is shown as a relatively small ship, designated as a corvette: its primary strength is in destroying Rebel starfighter squadrons, and it finds itself on relatively equal footing against opposing corvettes, such as the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] (with only a slightly greater firepower output), but it was easy prey for [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigates]] and heavy frigates. Despite falling under the category of [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] under the [[Anaxes War College System/Legends|Anaxes War College System]] of starship classification, the ''Tartan''-class was designated as a corvette in ''Empire at War'', probably due to its in-game role.

The [[Databank (original)|Databank]] originally listed as the length of the Tartan-class patrol cruiser as 600 meters. A post by [[Leland Chee]] on the [[StarWars.com]] forums updated the length to 250 meters, which is more in-line with the scale found in ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.<ref name="TOSupdate" />

Leftover descriptors in the ''Empire at War'' XML data files indicate that the ''Tartan''-class was intended to be the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class]].<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''—SPACEUNITSCORVETTES. xml, Row 5</ref>

The stat block in ''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' states two laser cannon batteries with 5 gunners each for a total of 10 laser cannons instead of 20 (as if every pair of cannons was fire-linked).

[[Wikipedia:Tartan|Tartan]] is a type of patterned cloth associated with [[Wikipedia:Scotland|Scotland]].
